# GKRTreeSplitStrategy

**Enumeration**

Options that control how a tree balances its internal structure when adding elements, used with the [doc://com.apple.gameplaykit/documentation/GameplayKit/GKRTree/addElement(_:boundingRectMin:boundingRectMax:splitStrategy:)] method.

## Declaration

```swift
enum GKRTreeSplitStrategy
```

## Constants

- **GKRTreeSplitStrategy.halve**: An option to split groups of elements in half based on the order they were added to the tree in.
- **GKRTreeSplitStrategy.linear**: An option to split groups of elements by finding a line that divides space so that half of the elements are on either side.
- **GKRTreeSplitStrategy.quadratic**: An option to split groups of elements by finding the subgroups that occupy the least area.
- **GKRTreeSplitStrategy.reduceOverlap**: An option to split groups of elements by finding the subgroups whose areas overlap the least.

## Initializers

- **init(rawValue:)**

## Conforms To

- BitwiseCopyable
- Equatable
- Hashable
- RawRepresentable
- Sendable
- SendableMetatype
